title: BBQ Bristle Free Grill Brush Stainless Steel
features: No extra power need and easy to use indoor and outdoor
description: The brush head has a stainless steel scraper that can easily scrub any stubborn sticky material no matter how much solid grease. The handle is made of stainless steel and is durable, with a wine cabinet at the end of the handle.
